subject: Fw: JE pick up in S76
body:
do you want to?


----- Forwarded Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: kellens@earthlink.net; JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Cc: lesley@nysgllc.com; rjalashgar@nysgmail.com; hkim@nysgmail.com
Sent: Thursday, December 20, 2007 11:40:27 PM
Subject: JE pick up in S76


Can you ask Jeffrey if he would like to be picked up in the Sikorsky, EAST side heliport and bring him to Teterboro for our departure today....Noon pick up at EAST side heliport....since our wheels up time is 12:30pm
please confirm,.
Larry
